task_description: Add a DynamoDB table for storing audio pipeline metadata and extend the Step Functions state machine with DynamoDB PutItem/UpdateItem tasks for tracking pipeline status (PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED). Follows strict TDD - tests written first, then implementation.

verification.summary: All 25 tests pass (14 existing + 11 new DynamoDB/StepFunctions tests). cdk synth succeeds. 100% code coverage. Tests verify DynamoDB table config (key schema, billing, encryption, PITR), state machine definition (PutItem, UpdateItem tasks, status values), and IAM permissions. All tests exercise real synthesized CloudFormation and would fail if implementation were reverted.
